sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59231" key="korufagenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορῠφ-ᾱγενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n59231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">head-born</tr_>, prop. epith. of Athena: in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pythag.</author> </bibl> philosophy, of an equilat. triangle, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τριτογένεια</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0632.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.381f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
